title: achyrophorus ciliatus
intro: Achyrophorus ciliatus, also known as Sea Fennel or False Fennel, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Achyrophorus ciliatus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Achyrophorus ciliatus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
